originalTitle: I am 71. Would it be foolish to sell $10,000 in stock to visit my grandchildren in Thailand?
summary: “I am comfortable living on my Social Security and pension income.”
content: “I am comfortable living on my Social Security and pension income.”
chineseTitle: 我今年 71 岁了。卖掉 10,000 美元的股票去泰国看望我的孙子是不是很愚蠢？
chineseSummary: “我靠社会保障和养老金收入生活得很舒服。”
chineseContent: “我靠社会保障和养老金收入生活得很舒服。”
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
